zh.Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England: 英國爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen Venables於1311年出生在英國爾金德頓時，她的父親Hugh de Venables55歲，母親Agatha de Vernon31歲。她於1342年與Adam de Hoghton在英國英格蘭藍卡爾蘭卡斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1386年在英國藍卡爾享年75歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen Venables was born in 1311, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, her father, Hugh de Venables, was 55 and her mother, Agatha de Vernon, was 31. She married Adam de Hoghton in 1342, in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1386, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen Venables est née en 1311, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Venables, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Agatha de Vernon, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Adam de Hoghton en 1342, à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1386, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellen Venables 1311 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Venables 55 und ihre Mutter Agatha de Vernon 31. Sie hat 1342 in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Adam de Hoghton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1386 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Lancashire, England und wurde in Lancashire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Venablesが1311年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Venablesは55歳，母Agatha de Vernonは31歳であった。1342年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアランカスターでAdam de Hoghtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1386年にイギリスランカシュアイアで75歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.Kinderton Cum Hulme, Northwich, Cheshire: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴 c 훌
ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Venables(이)가 1311년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Venables(은)는 55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agatha de Vernon(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1342년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 랭커스터에서 Adam de Hoghton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1386년 영국 랭카실르에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Venables nasceu em 1311, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Venables, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Agatha de Vernon, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Adam de Hoghton em 1342, em Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1386, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.Kinderton Cum Hulme, Northwich, Cheshire: киндиртон кум хулм, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen Venables родилась в 1311 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Venables было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Agatha de Vernon, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adam de Hoghton в 1342 г. в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1386 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellen Venables nació en 1311, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Venables, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Agatha de Vernon, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Adam de Hoghton en 1342, en Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1386, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Lancashire, Inglaterra.
